title: Affinity
description: A magic mod themed around natural tech
body:
![An Aspen Infusion ritual in a Wisp Forest with the "Affinity" word mark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba48a34b38dcf1e71de076fd32c5d82573e42fdb.png)

**Affinity** is a magic mod all about *Aethum*, an energy emanating from and necessary for all manifestations of life, and its semi-physical counterpart *Aethum Flux*. Discover how, through twisting and bending these very fundamental forces, you can create powerful magical tools, useful machinery powered by *Aethum Flux* and take control over life and death.

All the while, it maintains a tasteful blend between the traditional features of a magic and a tech mod - after all, magic is only tech that we have not yet understood. Inspired by the likes of Thaumcraft and Botania, Affinity strives to deliver a somewhat familiar yet brand-new experience, building on what those mods did well and improving where there was potential left on the table.

To get a good first look at what **Affinity** has to offer, check out the [**Gallery**](https://modrinth.com/mod/affinity/gallery)

## The Wispen Testament
![An entry from the Wispen Testament on Aethum distribution throughout the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8TA5POy/images/04902c9fa19cfb59a713401fa8069e02f97e99b6.png)

The **Wispen Testament**, Affinity's comprehensive guide, covers every aspect of the mod in detail and leads you along every step of the way. Built using [Lavender](https://modrinth.com/mod/lavender), it delivers an intuitive, familiar and seamlessly integrated guidebook experience.

![The Wispen Testament displaying an entry while held in the offhand for reference, while setting up a ritual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8TA5POy/images/d2016393dc32c15b454fc0f2a22fee9526f1a5ce.png)

## Credits
Affinity has been a huge undertaking over 3 years in development and would not have been possible without the help of many people. I, glisco, extend my thanks to:
- **naschhorn** and **pvpTurtle**, for spending countless hours with me brainstorming ideas, balancing and testing the mod
- **Pois1x**, for providing many of the textures in the mod
- [**chyzman**](https://modrinth.com/user/chyzman), for inspiring countless little and some more major features
- [**BasiqueEvangelist**](https://github.com/basiqueevangelist), for his occasional code contributions and ideas
- [**Aikoyori**](https://aikoyori.xyz/), for their texture and model contributions 
- [**Noaaan**](https://github.com/noaaan), for helping with gameplay design and his inexhaustible knowledge on the game's armor and weapon systems
- [**Halbzwilling**](https://youtube.com/@halbzwilling), for inspiring me to start modding all those years ago and strongly influencing some parts of Affinity's design through his NoGravity datapacks
- The remaining Wisp Forest team for their moral support and just overall being a great bunch of people

To anybody else who has inspired me, or someone else on the team, thank you!

---

A [**Wisp Forest**](https://github.com/wisp-forest) mod
